description.value:
After the third Dragon Pillar falls, the amber drinks in restored magic: golden starlight flares and the leaf cycles smoothly. This is the awakened stat block — keep a copy of the dormant item if you still need the earlier version on the timeline.

Aura 30 feet (see effect for bonuses).

Stitch the Fracture R (once per round)

Trigger An ally in the aura takes persistent damage.

Effect You attempt a flat check to end that persistent damage (DC 10, or DC 5 if an ally already assisted treating the wound this turn). The system does not automate this — roll in chat.

Borrowed Seconds 1 (once per day, after resting)

Pick one ally in the aura. They become @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl] for 1 round; table rule: that extra action may be used only to Stride, Step, or Interact.
